items.title: Debrief Prism Layer in-person meeting and align on seed round next steps
items.context: In-person meeting with Simone Garreau (Prism Layer) held at Fin Capital offices on May 26. Jake shared LH notes + deck to Logan ahead of the meeting. Simone shared seed round pitch deck on May 15.

items.title: Prep for SMBC AD management meeting about Atlas Beyond Fund
items.context: Calendar event 'SMBC AD management meeting about SMBC Fin Atlas Beyond Fund' on May 27 with SMBC team (Yuji Ogata, Ryo Ishii, et al.) and Fin team. Ryo Ishii emailed on May 16 wanting to align on key points ahead of this meeting.

items.title: Prep for Vanguard catch-up with Del Giannotti
items.context: Calendar event 'Vanguard <> Fin Capital catch-up' on May 28 at 12:30pm ET via Zoom with Fan and Derek attending.

items.title: Prep for Workday Ventures meeting
items.context: Calendar event 'Fin Capital <> Workday Ventures' on May 28 at 3pm ET via Zoom with Jeff Wantman, Savannah Greene, and Sarah Ospina from Workday Ventures; Fan and Derek attending from Fin.

items.title: Prep for Kindo AI intro call
items.context: Calendar event 'Kindo AI <> Fin Capital' on May 28 at 6:45pm ET via Zoom with Emma and Ron from Kindo AI; Fan, Logan, and Derek attending.

items.title: Coordinate NYC Tech Week schedule and logistics (Jun 1-5)
items.context: Calendar block 'NYC Tech Week' from Jun 1-5 with full team attending. Multiple events during the week including CISO Breakfast with Thoropass on Jun 2, D-Wave Investor Day on Jun 1, and Axios AI+NY Summit on Jun 3.

items.title: Prep for NYTW CISO Breakfast with Thoropass
items.context: Calendar hold 'NYTW / CISO Breakfast' on Jun 2 at 8:30am ET at 114 Crosby St with Thoropass team (Claire Lamb, Javier Santin). Lauren, Jake, Derek, and Jackie attending.
